notes: Strong security posture with helmet, CORS, rate limiting, body size limit, and thorough express-validator schemas. XSS sanitizer is naive (only strips <>, misses entities/event handlers). 404 handler reflects req.path back in JSON. No auth, acceptable for task scope. Error handling is solid with global handler covering JSON parse errors, entity-too-large, and unhandled exceptions, but lacks app.listen error handling and graceful shutdown (SIGTERM). DRY violation: PUT route duplicates validation chains already defined in createTodoValidation/updateTodoValidation instead of composing them. Sorts by re-parsing ISO date strings rather than storing numeric timestamps. Robustness is good with pagination caps, UUID param validation, and PATCH empty-body guard, but no memory cap on the Map (OOM risk under load) and no request timeout configuration.
